task_description: Massively upgrade MK OS with accuracy-first AI capabilities: internet search, fact verification, freshness tracking, cited responses, honesty engine, LLM knowledge extraction tool, knowledge integrator, and 700+ new knowledge base facts

verification.summary: make all builds mk_os binary with zero errors (only pre-existing warnings in system/shell.cpp). make tools builds all 3 tools (mk_ingest, mk_telegram, mk_llm_eater) successfully. Knowledge files expanded from 650 to 1749 lines with 1636 real facts.
